debug_traceBlockByHash.description: Replays all transactions in a block by block hash and returns traces for each.

paramsDocs.name: blockHash
paramsDocs.description: 32-byte block hash.

paramsDocs.name: options
paramsDocs.description: Object specifying the tracer.

children.name: tracer
children.description: "callTracer" or "prestateTracer".

debug_traceBlockByHash.returns: Array of trace results, one per transaction in the block, with the same shape as debug_traceBlockByNumber.

debug_traceBlockByNumber.description: Replays all transactions in a block by block number and returns traces for each.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

paramsDocs.name: options
paramsDocs.description: Object specifying the tracer.

children.name: tracer
children.description: "callTracer" or "prestateTracer".

debug_traceBlockByNumber.returns: Array of trace results, one per transaction in the block, each with a result field containing the trace output (same structure as debug_traceTransaction).

debug_traceCall.description: Simulates a call at a given block and returns the trace—without submitting a transaction. Useful for debugging contract interactions before sending them.

paramsDocs.name: transaction
paramsDocs.description: Transaction call object (same fields as eth_call).

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

paramsDocs.name: options
paramsDocs.description: Object specifying the tracer.

children.name: tracer
children.description: "callTracer" or "prestateTracer".

debug_traceCall.returns: Same trace output as debug_traceTransaction, but for a simulated call.

debug_traceTransaction.description: Replays a transaction and returns the execution trace. Useful for debugging failed transactions, analyzing internal calls, and inspecting state changes.

paramsDocs.name: transactionHash
paramsDocs.description: 32-byte hash of the transaction to trace.

paramsDocs.name: options
paramsDocs.description: Object specifying the tracer.

children.name: tracer
children.description: "callTracer" or "prestateTracer".

debug_traceTransaction.returns: Trace object whose shape depends on the selected tracer (callTracer returns a call tree with nested CALL/DELEGATECALL/STATICCALL frames, prestateTracer returns the pre-execution state of every account touched by the transaction).

eth_accounts.description: Returns a list of addresses owned by the node. On the public Linea RPC endpoint the node does not manage any accounts, so this method always returns an empty array.
eth_accounts.returns: Array of 20-byte addresses owned by the node; always [] on rpc.linea.build.

eth_blockNumber.description: Returns the number of the most recent block.
eth_blockNumber.returns: Hexadecimal integer of the current block number.

eth_call.description: Executes a call message without creating a transaction on the blockchain. Commonly used to read data from smart contracts.

paramsDocs.name: transaction
paramsDocs.description: Transaction call object.

children.name: from
children.description: 20-byte sender address.

children.name: to
children.description: 20-byte contract address.

children.name: gas
children.description: Hexadecimal gas provided.

children.name: gasPrice
children.description: Hexadecimal gas price.

children.name: value
children.description: Hexadecimal value in wei.

children.name: data
children.description: Hash of the method signature and encoded parameters.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

eth_call.returns: Hexadecimal return data from the executed contract call.

eth_chainId.description: Returns the chain ID of the connected network. Linea Mainnet is `0xe708` (59144). Linea Sepolia is `0xe705` (59141).
eth_chainId.returns: Hexadecimal value of the chain ID.

eth_estimateGas.description: Returns an estimate of gas needed to execute a transaction. The transaction is not sent.

paramsDocs.name: transaction
paramsDocs.description: Transaction call object (same fields as eth_call).

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest.

eth_estimateGas.returns: Hexadecimal value of the estimated gas.

eth_feeHistory.description: Returns historical gas information across a range of blocks, useful for tracking fee trends.

paramsDocs.name: blockCount
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal number of blocks in the requested range.

paramsDocs.name: newestBlock
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number or latest.

paramsDocs.name: rewardPercentiles
paramsDocs.description: Array of percentile values (for example, [25, 50, 75]) to sample from each block's effective priority fees.

eth_feeHistory.returns: Object containing oldestBlock, baseFeePerGas array, gasUsedRatio array, and (when rewardPercentiles is supplied) a reward array of effective priority fees at the requested percentiles.

eth_gasPrice.description: Returns the current gas price in wei.
eth_gasPrice.returns: Hexadecimal value of the current gas price in wei.

eth_getBalance.description: Returns the ETH balance of an address at a given block.

paramsDocs.name: address
paramsDocs.description: 20-byte address.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

eth_getBalance.returns: Hexadecimal value of the balance in wei.

eth_getBlockByHash.description: Returns block information by block hash.

paramsDocs.name: blockHash
paramsDocs.description: 32-byte hash of a block.

paramsDocs.name: fullTransactions
paramsDocs.description: If true, returns full transaction objects. If false, returns only transaction hashes.

eth_getBlockByHash.returns: A block object with the same shape as eth_getBlockByNumber, or null if no block is found.

eth_getBlockByNumber.description: Returns block information by block number.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

paramsDocs.name: fullTransactions
paramsDocs.description: If true, returns full transaction objects. If false, returns only transaction hashes.

eth_getBlockByNumber.returns: A block object, or null if no block is found. Key fields include number, hash, parentHash, timestamp, gasUsed, gasLimit, baseFeePerGas, and transactions.

eth_getBlockReceipts.description: Returns all transaction receipts for a given block.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

eth_getBlockReceipts.returns: Array of transaction receipt objects for the block, each with the same shape as eth_getTransactionReceipt.

eth_getBlockTransactionCountByHash.description: Returns the number of transactions in a block, given the block hash.

paramsDocs.name: blockHash
paramsDocs.description: 32-byte hash of a block.

eth_getBlockTransactionCountByHash.returns: Hexadecimal integer of the transaction count, or null if no block is found.

eth_getBlockTransactionCountByNumber.description: Returns the number of transactions in a block, given the block number.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

eth_getBlockTransactionCountByNumber.returns: Hexadecimal integer of the transaction count.

eth_getCode.description: Returns the bytecode at a given contract address. Returns `0x` if the address is not a contract.

paramsDocs.name: address
paramsDocs.description: 20-byte address of the contract.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

eth_getCode.returns: The bytecode at the given address, as a hex string.

eth_getFilterChanges.description: Polls a filter for new data since the last poll. For log filters, returns new logs. For block filters, returns new block hashes.

paramsDocs.name: filterId
paramsDocs.description: The filter ID returned by eth_newFilter or eth_newBlockFilter.

eth_getFilterChanges.returns: Array of log objects (for log filters) or block hashes (for block filters); empty array if nothing has changed since the last poll.

eth_getFilterLogs.description: Returns all logs matching the filter criteria since the filter was created. Only works with log filters created by `eth_newFilter`, not block filters.

paramsDocs.name: filterId
paramsDocs.description: The filter ID returned by eth_newFilter.

eth_getFilterLogs.returns: Array of log objects with the same shape as the response from eth_getLogs.

eth_getLogs.description: Returns logs matching a given filter object.

paramsDocs.name: filter
paramsDocs.description: Filter object.

children.name: fromBlock
children.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest.

children.name: toBlock
children.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest.

children.name: address
children.description: 20-byte contract address or array of addresses.

children.name: topics
children.description: Array of 32-byte topic values; each position can be a single value, an array of values (OR), or null (wildcard).

children.name: blockHash
children.description: 32-byte block hash. If set, fromBlock and toBlock are ignored.

eth_getLogs.returns: Array of log objects. Each log includes address, topics, data, blockNumber, transactionHash, transactionIndex, blockHash, logIndex, and removed.

eth_getStorageAt.description: Returns the value stored at a given storage slot of a contract address.

paramsDocs.name: address
paramsDocs.description: 20-byte address of the contract.

paramsDocs.name: position
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal integer of the storage slot position.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

eth_getStorageAt.returns: The 32-byte value at the given storage position, as a hex string.

eth_getTransactionByBlockHashAndIndex.description: Returns transaction data by block hash and transaction index position.

paramsDocs.name: blockHash
paramsDocs.description: 32-byte hash of a block.

paramsDocs.name: transactionIndex
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal integer of the transaction index position within the block.

eth_getTransactionByBlockHashAndIndex.returns: A transaction object with the same shape as eth_getTransactionByHash, or null if no transaction is found at the given index.

eth_getTransactionByBlockNumberAndIndex.description: Returns transaction data by block number and transaction index position.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

paramsDocs.name: transactionIndex
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal integer of the transaction index position within the block.

eth_getTransactionByBlockNumberAndIndex.returns: A transaction object with the same shape as eth_getTransactionByHash, or null if no transaction is found at the given index.

eth_getTransactionByHash.description: Returns transaction data for a given transaction hash.

paramsDocs.name: transactionHash
paramsDocs.description: 32-byte transaction hash.

eth_getTransactionByHash.returns: A transaction object, or null if no transaction is found.

eth_getTransactionCount.description: Returns the number of transactions sent from an address (the account nonce).

paramsDocs.name: address
paramsDocs.description: 20-byte address.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

eth_getTransactionCount.returns: Hexadecimal integer of the number of transactions sent from the address.

eth_getTransactionReceipt.description: Returns the receipt of a transaction by transaction hash. Receipts are only available for transactions that have been included in a block.

paramsDocs.name: transactionHash
paramsDocs.description: 32-byte transaction hash.

eth_getTransactionReceipt.returns: A transaction receipt object, or null if the transaction is pending or not found. Key fields include status (0x1 success, 0x0 failure), gasUsed, logs, and contractAddress (if a contract was created).

eth_maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: Returns the current priority fee per gas in wei. This is the tip paid to validators above the base fee.
eth_maxPriorityFeePerGas.returns: Hexadecimal value of the current max priority fee per gas in wei.

eth_newBlockFilter.description: Creates a filter to receive notifications when new blocks are produced. Poll the filter with `eth_getFilterChanges` to retrieve new block hashes since the last poll.

eth_newFilter.description: Creates a log filter and returns a filter ID. Use the ID with `eth_getFilterChanges` to poll for new logs, or `eth_getFilterLogs` to read all matching logs at once.

paramsDocs.name: filter
paramsDocs.description: Filter object (same shape as eth_getLogs).

children.name: fromBlock
children.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest. Defaults to latest.

children.name: toBlock
children.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest. Defaults to latest.

children.name: address
children.description: Contract address or array of addresses.

children.name: topics
children.description: Array of 32-byte topic values; each position can be a single value, an array of values (OR), or null (wildcard).

eth_sendBundle.description: Privately sends a bundle of signed transactions to be executed atomically, allowing the caller to define transaction execution order. This enables services such as frontrunning protection, gas abstraction, and revert protection. Due to being sent atomically, the bundle will only be executed if all transactions are confirmed.

paramsDocs.name: txs
paramsDocs.description: An array of signed transactions to execute in the bundle.

paramsDocs.name: blockNumber
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number for the block the bundle is valid in.

paramsDocs.name: minTimestamp
paramsDocs.description: Minimum timestamp for which the bundle is valid, in seconds since the unix epoch.

paramsDocs.name: maxTimestamp
paramsDocs.description: Maximum timestamp for which the bundle is valid, in seconds since the unix epoch.

eth_sendBundle.returns: An object containing bundleHash, the hash of the executed bundle.

eth_sendRawTransaction.description: Submits a pre-signed and serialized transaction and returns the transaction hash if successful. This endpoint can help prevent transactions being rejected due to exceeding the sequencer's per-block line limit. If the line count check fails, it returns an error message indicating the transaction is likely to be rejected.

paramsDocs.name: transaction data
paramsDocs.description: The signed transaction data.

eth_sendRawTransaction.returns: The 32-byte transaction hash, or the zero hash if the transaction is not yet available.

eth_syncing.description: Returns the sync status of the node. Returns `false` when the node is fully synced.
eth_syncing.returns: false if the node is synced, or an object with startingBlock, currentBlock, and highestBlock if syncing is in progress.

eth_uninstallFilter.description: Removes a filter. Call this when you no longer need the filter to free resources on the node. Filters also expire automatically after a period of inactivity.

paramsDocs.name: filterId
paramsDocs.description: The filter ID to remove.

eth_uninstallFilter.returns: true if the filter was found and removed, false otherwise.

linea_estimateGas.description: Generates and returns an estimate of how much gas is necessary to allow the transaction to complete and be published on Ethereum. The transaction will not be added to the blockchain.

paramsDocs.name: call
paramsDocs.description: Transaction call object.

children.name: from
children.description: 20 bytes - the address the transaction is sent from.

children.name: to
children.description: 20 bytes - the address the transaction is directed to.

children.name: gas
children.description: Hexadecimal value of the gas provided for the transaction execution.

children.name: gasPrice
children.description: Hexadecimal value of the gas price used for each paid gas.

children.name: maxPriorityFeePerGas
children.description: Maximum fee, in wei, the sender is willing to pay per gas above the base fee.

children.name: maxFeePerGas
children.description: Maximum total fee (base fee + priority fee), in wei, the sender is willing to pay per gas.

children.name: value
children.description: Hexadecimal value of the value sent with this transaction.

children.name: data
children.description: Hash of the method signature and encoded parameters.

paramsDocs.name: stateOverride
paramsDocs.description: Object that contains the address-to-state mapping to override state values. Each entry specifies a state that will be temporarily overridden before executing the call.

children.name: balance
children.description: Hexadecimal of the temporary account balance for the call execution.

children.name: nonce
children.description: Hexadecimal of the temporary nonce value for the call execution.

children.name: code
children.description: Bytecode to inject into the account.

children.name: stateDiff
children.description: key:value pairs to override individual slots in the account storage.

linea_estimateGas.returns: Hexadecimal values representing the recommended gas limit, the base fee per gas, and the priority fee per gas.

linea_getProof.description: Returns the account and storage values, including the Merkle proof, of the specified account. The supplied block parameter must be an L2 block that has been finalized on L1.

paramsDocs.name: address
paramsDocs.description: Address (20 bytes) for which the proof is requested.

paramsDocs.name: storageKeys
paramsDocs.description: Array of 32-byte storage keys to be proofed and included.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized (must be an L2 block finalized on L1).

linea_getProof.returns: Object containing accountProof (key, leafIndex, proof with proofRelatedNodes and value) and storageProofs (array of entries with key, leftLeafIndex/leftProof, rightLeafIndex/rightProof).

linea_getTransactionExclusionStatusV1.description: Queries a temporary database maintained by the transaction exclusion API service to check if a transaction was rejected by the sequencer, connected P2P node, or RPC nodes for exceeding data line limits that would prevent the prover from generating a proof.

result.reasonMessage: Transaction line count for module ADD=402 is above the limit 70

paramsDocs.name: txHash
paramsDocs.description: The hash of the subject transaction.

linea_getTransactionExclusionStatusV1.returns: Object with txHash, from, nonce, txRejectionStage (SEQUENCER, RPC, or P2P), reasonMessage, blockNumber (sequencer rejections only), and timestamp; null if the transaction was not rejected or is older than seven days.

net_listening.description: Returns `true` if the node is actively listening for network connections.
net_listening.returns: Boolean; true if the node is listening, false otherwise.

net_peerCount.description: Returns the number of peers currently connected to the node.
net_peerCount.returns: Hexadecimal integer of the peer count.

net_version.description: Returns the network ID as a decimal string. On Linea Mainnet this is `59144`. On Linea Sepolia it is `59141`.
net_version.returns: Decimal string of the network ID.

trace_block.description: Returns all traces for every transaction in a block, in the OpenEthereum/Parity trace format.

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest, earliest, pending, finalized.

trace_block.returns: Array of trace objects across all transactions in the block; each trace includes transactionHash and transactionPosition to identify which transaction it belongs to.

trace_call.description: Simulates a call and returns the trace in the OpenEthereum/Parity format, without broadcasting a transaction. Similar to `debug_traceCall` but returns the OpenEthereum trace shape.

paramsDocs.name: transaction
paramsDocs.description: Transaction call object (from, to, gas, gasPrice, value, data).

paramsDocs.name: traceTypes
paramsDocs.description: Array of trace types to return. Valid values: "trace", "stateDiff", "vmTrace".

paramsDocs.name: blockParameter
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal block number, or latest.

trace_call.returns: Object with fields corresponding to the requested trace types: output (hex-encoded call return data), trace (array of call trace objects), stateDiff (state changes), vmTrace (VM-level trace).

trace_transaction.description: Returns all traces for a given transaction in the OpenEthereum/Parity trace format. Traces include internal calls that are not visible in a standard transaction receipt.

paramsDocs.name: transactionHash
paramsDocs.description: 32-byte transaction hash.

trace_transaction.returns: Array of trace objects. Each trace includes an action object (callType, from, to, gas, input, value) and a result object (gasUsed, output).

web3_clientVersion.description: Returns the client software version running the node.
web3_clientVersion.returns: String describing the client and its version.

web3_sha3.description: Returns the Keccak-256 hash of the given data. Note: despite the name, this method returns Keccak-256 (as used throughout Ethereum for function selectors, event topics, and address derivation), not the standardised SHA-3 (FIPS-202).

paramsDocs.name: data
paramsDocs.description: Hexadecimal string to hash.
